fields.summary: Specifies options for creating an XPS document using <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocument" />.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKDocumentXpsOptions` is a struct that holds options for XPS document creation.
Because it is a struct, the default value of `DPI` is `0.0f`, not 72. To use the
standard 72 DPI, assign <xref:SkiaSharp.SKDocument.DefaultRasterDpi> explicitly.

This is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var options = new SKDocumentXpsOptions
{
    DPI = SKDocument.DefaultRasterDpi,
    AllowNoPngs = false,
};
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether PNG images may be omitted from the XPS output.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if PNG images may be omitted from the XPS output; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the dots per inch (DPI) for rasterized content in the XPS document.
fields.value: The DPI value for rasterized content. The default value for a new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" /> instance is <c>0.0f</c>.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
